name: computer-config
description: Inspect local operating system and hardware configuration.

interface.shortDescription: Summarize local hardware and OS specs
interface.longDescription: A local utility plugin for inspecting the current computer's operating system, CPU, memory, GPU, disk, and runtime details without collecting secrets.
defaultPrompt: Use $inspect-computer-config to summarize this computer configuration.
Use $inspect-computer-config to collect OS, CPU, memory, GPU, and disk details.
